channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 'I'd wait forever, but 334 days is crazy.' USS Ford finally returns home
item.description: The USS Ford received a hero's welcome. Sailors were away for nearly a year, enduring two conflicts, a fire, and sewer issues.

item.title: Summer electric bills soar as cooling costs rise
item.description: Temperatures are rising, and so are utility bills. Higher electricity prices and hotter weather may make it especially expensive.

item.title: Free fish fillets may help Maine's struggling fishing industry
item.description: Rising food and fuel costs hurt Maine's groundfishing industry, but a pandemic-era program offers support.

item.title: 15 years after deadly Joplin tornado, community kindness endures
item.description: Nearly 100,000 volunteers helped rebuild Joplin, and a spirit of service persists, researchers say.
